overall.description: A first-person walk through a misty lakeside environment in a fantasy game setting, featuring ornate stone architecture and a large wooden boathouse. The player character descends from an upper terrace, passes other students, and enters the boathouse interior to reach a docked boat.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone terrace with balustrades overlooking misty lake

events.description: encounter two students in dark robes ascending the stairs toward the camera
begin descending the curved stone staircase toward the lower terrace

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper terrace balustrade and descending the curved stone stairs toward the lake

notable_agents.action: two students in school robes walking up the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: ornate carved stone balustrades with rounded finials lining the walkway
curved stone staircase descending toward the water's edge
misty lake surface with gentle ripples reflecting the overcast sky
green leafy tree growing on the upper terrace
rocky cliff wall with moss and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a misty stone terrace overlooking a lake, with ornate balustrades framing the view. The camera descends a curved staircase, passing two students in robes who are walking up toward the upper level. The atmosphere is cool and overcast, with distant mountains barely visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside promenade with view of distant castle and forested mountains

events.description: text overlay 'The Boathouse' appears identifying the large wooden building ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path toward the boathouse structure

notable_agents.action: two students walking up the stairs from the lower waterfront path

entered.detail: large dark wooden building with ornate gothic carvings and steep roof situated on the water
stone pillars with burning torches marking the path
castle spires visible on the hillside across the lake

segments.scene_description: Having reached the lower level, the camera proceeds along a stone path at the water's edge. The large wooden boathouse dominates the right side of the frame, with the text 'The Boathouse' appearing on screen. The same two students are seen again on the left, continuing their ascent up the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: boathouse exterior walkway with ornate wooden architecture and stone pillars

events.description: approaching and entering the large arched wooden door of the boathouse

agents.ego_description: walking around the boathouse exterior and approaching the entrance door

entered.detail: large arched wooden door with diagonal planking and ornate iron hinges
decorative stone columns with carved capitals flanking the entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the side of the boathouse, passing stone lanterns and ornate wooden walls. The path curves toward the entrance where a large carved wooden door stands open. The surrounding architecture features intricate gothic details and heavy timber framing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered interior dock corridor with arched openings to the lake

events.description: entering the boathouse interior through the wooden door into a stone corridor
reaching the dock where a wooden boat is moored on the water

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior corridor toward the water exit and docked boat

entered.detail: series of gothic stone arches forming the corridor with open views to the lake
wooden rowboat with carved prow moored at the dock inside the boathouse
stone platform at water level for boarding boats

segments.scene_description: Inside the boathouse, the camera moves through a dimly lit stone corridor with gothic arches opening to the lake. Wall sconces provide warm light contrasting with the cool natural light from the water. The segment ends at the dock where a wooden boat awaits, with misty mountains visible through the archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty, elevated stone terrace down into the warm, sheltered interior of a lakeside boathouse. It begins by descending a curved staircase past robed students, moving from the cool, overcast atmosphere of the upper terrace toward the water's edge. As the camera reaches the lower level, the view expands to reveal a large wooden structure labeled The Boathouse, passing stone lanterns and intricate gothic timber framing along a curving path. The scene then shifts from the open, hazy exterior into a dimly lit stone corridor where warm wall sconces contrast with the natural light filtering through gothic arches. Finally, the movement concludes at a wooden dock where a boat awaits, with the misty mountains still visible through the architectural openings.
